ddt:Target.Name: DDCR - BEA7 - v5.0
ddt:Target.Description:
Injection Common Rail DELPHI DDCR
Applications : X65ph3 / Almera / Jimny Logiciels : C4J61/BEA7
Date : 24/01/2006 Auteur : Guillaume DONY Email : guillaume.dony@delphi.com Tel. : 33 (0)1 76 87 04 63 API : FR CTL L49 2 65
--------------------------------------------------- Documents de référence
DTC et données d'environnements : A_DG_FLT_C4J5_B65_712_EU3_EOBD version 1.1 - 03/05/2004
Datas, trames et services : R6510194 version 18.0 "KW2000 Diagnostic Services (X65)" - 23/08/2004
--------------------------------------------------- Historique
Version 5.0 : - Création depuis la base DDCR - BEA7 - v4.1 - Refonte et mise en conformité selon les standards qualité de la base DCM1.2 - L4D8 - Introduction des nouvelles requêtes C2I pour l'écran générique "Diesel Injector code" - Les écrans sont revus et réorganisés par type de service - Pour les services supportées par des écrans génériques DDT2000 (ex : C2i, VIN, etc.), il faut utiliser ces-derniers : la base ne les contient plus.
Version 4.1 : - Traitement des données en 32bits signées
Version 4.0 : - Ajout du traitement de la donnée IM_EOL_Priming_done_NVV - Modification du service ECUReset ($11) (--> Ajout d'un mode de reset et renommage des anciens modes) - Modification du VDiag (deux VDiag $1C et $20 pour X65 PHIII 712 )
Version 3.1 : - Modification pour correction de la longueur des trames 61C9 et 3BDD - Modification des noms des Freeze Frames pour permettre leur affichage lors de diagnostique de pannes.
Version 3.0 : - Création pour le logiciel BEA6 (C4J50) - Travail sur les données d'environnements, écrans (certaines formules de conversion sont encore à vérifier)

Data.Name: !Engine_antitheft_enable
Data.Comment: Indicates the status of the engine antitheft

Data.Name: AC_Active
Data.Comment: Indicates if the air conditioning system is active

Data.Name: AC_Comp_pressure
Data.Comment: Air conditioning compressor pressure

Data.Name: AC_Fan1_request
Data.Comment: Indicates that there has been a request to switch fan 1 on

Data.Name: AC_Fan2_request
Data.Comment: Indicates that there has been a request to switch fan 2 on

Data.Name: AC_Power_absorbed
Data.Comment: Measure of power absorbed by air conditioning unit - varies with Ac_in_pulse_off_width

Data.Name: AC_Raised_idle_request
Data.Comment: engine idle speeded up request

Data.Name: AC_Relay_drive
Data.Comment: AC Relay Drive mapped to SPI Medium Power Driver

Data.Name: AC_Type_configuration_NVV
Data.Comment: Indicates the type of air conditioner configured

Data.Name: AC_Type_fitted_NVV = AC_COLD_LOOP
Data.Comment: Air conditioner : Cold loop seen

Data.Name: AC_Type_fitted_NVV = AC_PWM
Data.Comment: Air conditioner : PWM seen

Data.Name: Air_temp_inlet_linearised [°C]
Data.Comment: Air temp inlet linearised for freeze frame

Data.Name: Air_temperature
Data.Comment: Air temperature read and calibrated from the air temperature sensor

Data.Name: Air_temperature [°C]
Data.Comment: air extern temperature for freeze frame

Data.Name: Air_temperature_inlet
Data.Comment: Air temperature inlet read and calibrated from the air temperature inlet sensor

Data.Name: Air_temperature_inlet [°C]
Data.Comment: Air Inlet Temperature for freeze frame

Data.Name: AMF_Demand [mg/str]
Data.Comment: Air mass flow demand for freeze frame

Data.Name: AMF_Feedback
Data.Comment: Air flow per stoke calculated from the air mass flow sensor input

Data.Name: AMF_Feedback [mg/str]
Data.Comment: air mass flow for freeze frame

Data.Name: AMF_Linearised [g/s]
Data.Comment: Air mass flow linearised for freeze frame

Data.Name: Aircharge_estimated
Data.Comment: Air flow per stoke estimated from Air Mass Flow Estimator

Data.Name: Anti_run_dry_occurred_NVV
Data.Comment: Indicates if an engine stop has been requested by the Anti Run Dry function

Data.Name: antitheft_get_codapri()
Data.Comment: Boolean indicating whether key is learned

Data.Name: antitheft_get_etaprot()
Data.Comment: Boolean indicating whether status is protected

Data.Name: APC phase
Data.Comment: Engine_speed=0 & Key_off_engaged=FALSE

Data.Name: Approval number
Data.Comment: Idf_80_prom_id : bytes 24 to 28

Data.Name: ASR_MSR_Ack
Data.Comment: Indicate the status of the ASR/MSR

Data.Name: Atmospheric_pressure
Data.Comment: Scaled, linearised, validated and slewed sensor reading

Data.Name: Atmospheric_pressure [mbar]
Data.Comment: Atmospheric Pressure for freeze frame

Data.Name: Atmospheric_pressure_linearised [mbar]
Data.Comment: atmospheric pressure linearised for freeze frame

Data.Name: Auto_gearbox_fitted_NVV
Data.Comment: Non-volatile variable to indicate the type of gearbox fitted: 0 : BVM, 1: BVA, 2 : BVR

Data.Name: Battery_voltage
Data.Comment: This is the voltage read on the battery voltage input after it has been validated

Data.Name: Battery_voltage [V]
Data.Comment: Battery Voltage for freeze frame

Data.Name: Boost_pressure_linearised1 [bar]
Data.Comment: Collector pressure linearised

Data.Name: Brake_depressed [-]
Data.Comment: brake contact for freeze frame

Data.Name: Brake_light_switch_active
Data.Comment: Signals the status of the brake light switch input

Data.Name: Brake_safety_switch_active
Data.Comment: Signals the status of the brake safety switch

Data.Name: Brake_sw_active
Data.Comment: Indicate that either the brake light switch or the brake safety switch is active

Data.Name: Bus Off
Data.Comment: diagnostic of "bus off module"

Data.Name: Calibration No
Data.Comment: Numero de calibration en Hexa

Data.Name: CAN_CE_Lamp
Data.Comment: Indicates the state of the check engine lamp drive

Data.Name: CAN_Clutch_active
Data.Comment: Status of the clutch.Output via CAN message Inj_hdg

Data.Name: CAN_Cool_lamp
Data.Comment: Status of the cool lamp

Data.Name: CAN_Coolant_temperature
Data.Comment: Coolant temperature

Data.Name: CAN_Diag_on
Data.Comment: Flag used to indicate if CAN diagnostics are enabled

Data.Name: CAN_Driver_request
Data.Comment: Value calculated and output via CAN message Inj_base_rapide representing a calculated pedal position

Data.Name: CAN_Engine_speed
Data.Comment: Scaled engine speed output via the CAN message

Data.Name: CAN_Frame_seen[0] - Friens_Base_Rapide
Data.Comment: Received a CAN frame Friens_Base_Rapide

Data.Name: CAN_Frame_seen[1] - Friens_ESP
Data.Comment: Received a CAN frame Friens_ESP

Data.Name: CAN_Frame_seen[2] - Tdb_Base
Data.Comment: Received a CAN frame Tdb_Base

Data.Name: CAN_Frame_seen[3] - Airbag
Data.Comment: Received a CAN frame Airbag

Data.Name: CAN_Frame_seen[4] - Transm
Data.Comment: Received a CAN frame Transm

Data.Name: CAN_Frame_seen[5] - Uch_Vers_Inj
Data.Comment: Received a CAN frame Uch_Vers_Inj

Data.Name: CAN_Fuel_cut_off
Data.Comment: Status of fuel cut off

Data.Name: CAN_Major_fault_lamp
Data.Comment: Indicates the state of the major fault lamp drive

Data.Name: CAN_MIL_Lamp
Data.Comment: Status of the MIL lamp

Data.Name: CAN_PPH_Lamp
Data.Comment: Status of the PPH lamp

Data.Name: CAN_Reset
Data.Comment: Indicate if this is the first message since after a power up

Data.Name: CC_Abnorm_deac_ems_NVV
Data.Comment: Abnormal deactivation due to engine management problem

Data.Name: CC_Abnorm_deac_failure_NVV
Data.Comment: Abnormal deactivation due to present or memorised failure

Data.Name: CC_Abnorm_deac_vspd_invld_NVV
Data.Comment: Abnormal deactivation due to invalid vehicle speed

Data.Name: CC_Abnorm_deac_vspd_notref_NVV
Data.Comment: Abnormal deactivation due to vehicle speed not updated

Data.Name: CC_Brake_1_mem_failure
Data.Comment: Indicates that a brake switches inconsistency failure is memorised

Data.Name: CC_Brake_1_pres_failure
Data.Comment: Indicates the presence of a brake switches inconsistency failure

Data.Name: CC_Brake_2_mem_failure
Data.Comment: Indicates that a failure of both brake switches is memorised

Data.Name: CC_Brake_2_pres_failure
Data.Comment: Indicates the presence of a failure of both brake switches

Data.Name: CC_CO_Cruise_control_lamp
Data.Comment: Commanded state of the cruise lamp

Data.Name: CC_CO_Cruise_control_status
Data.Comment: Status of the cruise/limiter system. This data is for tx via the CAN bus

Data.Name: CC_CO_Target_speed_blink
Data.Comment: Indicating the status of the requested speed indication. 0 = indicator fixed 1 = indicator flashing

Data.Name: CC_CO_Target_speed_display
Data.Comment: Requested cruise speed

Data.Name: CC_Cruise_control_state <> CC_DISABLED
Data.Comment: State of the cruise control subsystem

Data.Name: CC_CS_Accel_switch_engaged
Data.Comment: indicates whether the accel switch is currently active

Data.Name: CC_CS_Cruise_switch_state
Data.Comment: state of the switch at present

Data.Name: CC_CS_Cruise_switch_state [-]
Data.Comment: Rv On for freeze frame

Data.Name: CC_CS_Decel_switch_engaged
Data.Comment: indicates whether the decel switch is currently active

Data.Name: CC_CS_Limiter_switch_state
Data.Comment: state of the switch at present

Data.Name: CC_CS_Limiter_switch_state [-]
Data.Comment: Lv on for freeze frame

Data.Name: CC_CS_Resume_request
Data.Comment: indicates whether the resume switch is currently active

Data.Name: CC_CS_Suspend_request
Data.Comment: Suspend switch pressed

Data.Name: CC_Norm_deac_NVV = CC_SUSP_ASR
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to ASR request

Data.Name: CC_Norm_deac_NVV = CC_SUSP_BRAKING
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to brake application

Data.Name: CC_Norm_deac_NVV = CC_SUSP_DECLUTCH
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to engine/gearbox disconnection

Data.Name: CC_Norm_deac_NVV = CC_SUSP_DRIVER
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to suspend switch press

Data.Name: CC_Norm_deac_NVV = CC_SUSP_NEUTRAL
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to AGB at neutral detection

Data.Name: CC_Norm_deac_NVV = CC_SUSP_SPD_RATIO
Data.Comment: Deactivation because set speed/vehicle speed ratio is incoherent

Data.Name: CC_SL_Speed_limiter_state <> SL_DISABLED
Data.Comment: State of the speed limiter subsystem

Data.Name: CC_TS_Target_speed
Data.Comment: Target speed programmed in the cruise app

Data.Name: CC_TS_Target_speed_
Data.Comment: Target speed programmed in the cruise app

Data.Name: CE_Lamp_drive
Data.Comment: Indicates the state of the CE lamp drive

Data.Name: Check_DC_Legislative_Conditions()
Data.Comment: OBD legislative conditions satisfied

Data.Name: Check_engine_lamp_drive_mode
Data.Comment: Indicates the state of the engine lamp drive

Data.Name: Check_Warm_Up_Cycle_Conditions()
Data.Comment: Warm up cycle complete : Check_Warm_Up_Cycle_Conditions() && Key_off_engaged == FALSE

Data.Name: Checked_main_fuel_demand
Data.Comment: Checked main fuel demand output

Data.Name: Checked_main_fuel_demand [mg/str]
Data.Comment: Fuel Flow for freeze frame

Data.Name: Chkd_main_timing_demand
Data.Comment: Checked/limited main injection timing demand

Data.Name: Chkd_main_timing_demand [edeg]
Data.Comment: Advance for freeze frame

Data.Name: Clutch_switch_active
Data.Comment: Signals the status of the generic switch; is set to TRUE if the switch is active

Data.Name: Clutch_switch_connected_NVV
Data.Comment: indicates whether Clutch switch connected

Data.Name: Configuration type
Data.Comment: Non-volatile variable to indicate the type of gearbox fitted: 0 : BVM, 1: BVA, 2 : BVR

Data.Name: Control_CU_relay_state [-]
Data.Comment: Power relay state for freeze frame

Data.Name: Cool_fan1_drive
Data.Comment: Coolant fan 1 relay drive

Data.Name: Cool_fan2_drive
Data.Comment: Coolant fan 2 relay drive

Data.Name: COOL_TEMP_CALIB_APV
Data.Comment: Indicates Engine Temp Calibration For Dashboard tuning data

Data.Name: Coolant_lamp_drive
Data.Comment: Indicates the state of the coolant lamp drive

Data.Name: Coolant_temperature
Data.Comment: Coolant temperature from the coolant sensor

Data.Name: Coolant_temperature [°C]
Data.Comment: Coolant temp for freeze frame

Data.Name: Coolant_temperature_linearised [°C]
Data.Comment: coolant temperature linearised

Data.Name: Correction type
Data.Comment: Identification of the software correction to activate

Data.Name: Correction way
Data.Comment: Identification of the software correction to activate

Data.Name: Crash_detected_NVV
Data.Comment: Diag byte upon reception of a coherent AIRBAG_Crash frame

Data.Name: Cruise_control_&_Speed_limiter_present_NVV
Data.Comment: Cruise control and Speed limiter option present

Data.Name: Cruise_control_present_NVV
Data.Comment: Cruise control option present

Data.Name: CRUISE_ON_OFF_SW_FLT_HARD
Data.Comment: Inconsistency on/off switch current failure

Data.Name: CRUISE_ON_OFF_SW_FLT_MEMORISED
Data.Comment: Inconsistency on/off switch memorised failure

Data.Name: CRUISE_SPEED_SW_FLT_HARD
Data.Comment: Steering wheel control buttons current failure

Data.Name: CRUISE_SPEED_SW_FLT_MEMORISED
Data.Comment: Steering wheel control buttons memorised failure

Data.Name: Diagnostic No
Data.Comment: Diag evolution number

Data.Name: Driver_commands_connected_NVV
Data.Comment: indicates whether driver commands connected

Data.Name: EGR_Actuator_fitted
Data.Comment: Flag indicating EGR is fitted

Data.Name: EGR_Control_state [-]
Data.Comment: The state variable of EGR control for freeze frame

Data.Name: EGR_Demand
Data.Comment: Percentage defining the current EGR demand

Data.Name: EGR_Demand [%]
Data.Comment: EGR demand for freeze frame

Data.Name: EGR_Feedback
Data.Comment: Percentage defining the current EGR valve position

Data.Name: EGR_Feedback [%]
Data.Comment: EGR feedback for freeze frame

Data.Name: EGR_Pos_offset_first_learn_NVV
Data.Comment: First learnt EGR valve position offset

Data.Name: EGR_Pos_offset_last_learn_NVV
Data.Comment: Last learnt EGR valve position offset

Data.Name: EGR_Pos_offsets_learn_done_NVV
Data.Comment: EGR valve position offsets have been learnt

Data.Name: EGR_Position_linearised [%]
Data.Comment: EGR position for freeze frame

Data.Name: EGR_Position_offset [%]
Data.Comment: EGR position offset for freeze frame

Data.Name: EGR_status
Data.Comment: EGR control state

Data.Name: Elec_cons_drive
Data.Comment: I/O driver on which Gepda drive is mapped

Data.Name: Electric_windscreen_seen_NVV
Data.Comment: Electric windscreen option present

Data.Name: Engine is cranking
Data.Comment: Engine_state=ENGINE_CRANKING & Engine_speed<>0 & Engine_stop_request=FALSE

Data.Name: Engine_boost_pressure
Data.Comment: Scaled, linearised and validated sensor reading

Data.Name: Engine_boost_pressure [bar]
Data.Comment: pressure collecteur for freeze frame

Data.Name: Engine_cycle_speed
Data.Comment: An average of injection speed over a complete Engine cycle (720 degrees)

Data.Name: Engine_cycle_speed [erpm]
Data.Comment: Engine speed for freeze frame

Data.Name: Engine_stalled (extern)
Data.Comment: Engine stalled by extern condition (not requested by Engine Management)

Data.Name: Engine_state [-]
Data.Comment: Engine State for freeze frame

Data.Name: Engine_state = ENGINE_RUNNING
Data.Comment: Engine is in RUNNING state

Data.Name: ESP_Frame_seen_NVV
Data.Comment: on-volatile variable to indicate whether the ESP message has been received

Data.Name: EWS_Active
Data.Comment: Indicates that the electrical windscreen system is active

Data.Name: Fan1_relay_fitted
Data.Comment: Flag indicating Fan 1 is fitted

Data.Name: Fan2_relay_fitted
Data.Comment: Flag indicating Fan 2 is fitted

Data.Name: Fault Mileage
Data.Comment: kilométrage effectué avec la panne présente

Data.Name: Fault Order
Data.Comment: ordre d'apparition de la panne

Data.Name: FFnoData1
Data.Comment: No data for freeze frame

Data.Name: FFnoData2
Data.Comment: No data for freeze frame

Data.Name: FFnoData3
Data.Comment: No data for freeze frame

Data.Name: FFnoData4
Data.Comment: No data for freeze frame

Data.Name: FFnoData5
Data.Comment: No data for freeze frame

Data.Name: FFnoData6
Data.Comment: No data for freeze frame

Data.Name: FFnoData7
Data.Comment: No data for freeze frame

Data.Name: FFnoData8
Data.Comment: No data for freeze frame

Data.Name: FirstDTC
Data.Comment: diagnostic trouble code

Item.Text: Mass or Volume Air Flow "A" Circuit
Internal Control Module Random Access Memory (RAM) Error
Engine Hot Lamp Output Control Circuit
Engine Coolant Heater "A" Relay Control Circuit
Engine Coolant Heater "B" Relay Control Circuit
Engine Coolant Heater "C" Relay Control Circuit

Data.Name: Frame 40 - read
Data.Comment: Complete Frame 40 for Read request

Data.Name: Frame 40 - write
Data.Comment: Complete Frame 40 for Write request

Data.Name: Frame 41 - read
Data.Comment: Complete Frame 41 for Read request

Data.Name: Frame 41 - write
Data.Comment: Complete Frame 41 for Write request

Data.Name: Frame 42 - read
Data.Comment: Complete Frame 42 for Read request

Data.Name: Frame 42 - write
Data.Comment: Complete Frame 42 for Write request

Data.Name: Friens_esp_receive_fault
Data.Comment: This flow indicates if there was a fault in the reception of the CAN message from the abs node

Data.Name: FUEL_CONSUMPTION_OUTPUT
Data.Comment: Fuel consumption output is active

Data.Name: Fuel_temp_linearised [°C]
Data.Comment: Fuel temperature linearised for freeze frame

Data.Name: Fuel_temperature
Data.Comment: Scaled, linearised, slewed and validated sensor reading

Data.Name: Fuel_temperature [°C]
Data.Comment: Fuel temperature for freeze frame

Data.Name: Gear_ratio [-]
Data.Comment: Gear Ratio for freeze frame

Data.Name: Gepda_connected <> 0
Data.Comment: Flag indicating if gepda is present

Data.Name: Gepda_relay_fitted
Data.Comment: Flag indicating Gepda is fitted

Data.Name: Get_OBD_DTC()
Data.Comment: OBD DTC of the fault in the Freeze Frame

Data.Name: Glowplug_lamp_drive
Data.Comment: Indicates the state of the glowplug lamp drive

Data.Name: Hardware No
Data.Comment: reference HARD du calculateur en B.C.D

Data.Name: Heater_1_drive
Data.Comment: Heater 1 Relay Drive mapped to SPI Medium Power Driver

Data.Name: Heater_2_drive
Data.Comment: Heater 2 Relay Drive mapped to SPI Medium Power Driver

Data.Name: Heater_3_drive
Data.Comment: Heater 3 Relay Drive mapped to SPI Medium Power Driver

Data.Name: Idle_target
Data.Comment: Calculated speed that the engine is trying to achieve during steady state idle conditions

Data.Name: Im_Actuator_fitted
Data.Comment: Flag indicating IM is fitted

Data.Name: IM_Control_state [-]
Data.Comment: IMV control state for freeze frame

Data.Name: IM_Current_trim_int_init[0]
Data.Comment: Initialisation term used to calculate IM_Current_trim_int whenever fuel demand goes over a threshold

Data.Name: IM_Current_trim_int_init[1]
Data.Comment: Initialisation term used to calculate IM_Current_trim_int whenever fuel demand goes over a threshold

Data.Name: IM_EOL_Priming_done_NVV
Data.Comment: Indicates that the pump has turned for a given period of time with the inlet metering valve

Data.Name: antitheft_get_pmeepvl()
Data.Comment: Indique une anomalie dans la sauvegarde du code en EEPROM

Item.Text: 0 - No problem with the EEPROM stored code
1 - Problem with the EEPROM stored code

Data.Name: Inj_bal_tooth_error_NVV
Data.Comment: The value of Inj_bal_tooth_error saved in NVM

Data.Name: Inj_bal_trim_offset_NVT[0]
Data.Comment: Learnt trim values for high load rated speed points for injector 1

Data.Name: Inj_bal_trim_offset_NVT[1]
Data.Comment: Learnt trim values for high load rated speed points for injector 2

Data.Name: Inj_bal_trim_offset_NVT[2]
Data.Comment: Learnt trim values for high load rated speed points for injector 3

Data.Name: Inj_bal_trim_offset_NVT[3]
Data.Comment: Learnt trim values for high load rated speed points for injector 4

Data.Name: Injection_speed[2] [erpm]
Data.Comment: injection speed for freeze frame

Data.Name: Injector_1_Cylinder_1_in_operation
Data.Comment: Injector of cylinder 1 control state

Data.Name: Injector_2_Cylinder_3_in_operation
Data.Comment: Injector of cylinder 3 control state

Data.Name: Injector_3_Cylinder_4_in_operation
Data.Comment: Injector of cylinder 4 control state

Data.Name: Injector_4_Cylinder_2_in_operation
Data.Comment: Injector of cylinder 2 control state

Data.Name: Injector_rise_time[0] [us]
Data.Comment: Current Time Rise of Injector 1 for freeze fame

Data.Name: Injector_rise_time[1] [us]
Data.Comment: Current Time Rise of Injector 2 for freeze fame

Data.Name: Injector_rise_time[2] [us]
Data.Comment: Current Time Rise of Injector 3 for freeze fame

Data.Name: Injector_rise_time[3] [us]
Data.Comment: Current Time Rise of Injector 4 for freeze fame

Data.Name: Key_off_engaged
Data.Comment: Set TRUE when a key off has been detected

Data.Name: Key_off_engaged [-]
Data.Comment: key State for freeze frame

Data.Name: Key_off_engaged_
Data.Comment: Set TRUE when a key off has been detected

Data.Name: Key_off_on_latched
Data.Comment: Indicates that a key off-on sequence has been detected

Data.Name: KLS_Engine_state
Data.Comment: Engine State for keyless functions

Data.Name: Km_CE_lamp_on_NVV
Data.Comment: Km CE lamp on NVV

Data.Name: Major_fault_lamp_drive
Data.Comment: Indicates the state of the major fault lamp drive

Data.Name: Major_fault_lamp_drive_mode
Data.Comment: Indicates the state of the major fault lamp drive

Data.Name: Manufacturer Code
Data.Comment: Ce code a toujours la valeur 0x00

Data.Name: MDP_INJECTOR_1_DAT_NVT[0] - 200b
Data.Comment: Minimum drive pulse for injector 1 at 200 bars

Data.Name: MDP_INJECTOR_1_DAT_NVT[1] - 1600b
Data.Comment: Minimum drive pulse for injector 1 at 1600 bars

Data.Name: MDP_INJECTOR_2_DAT_NVT[0] - 200b
Data.Comment: Minimum drive pulse for injector 2 at 200 bars

Data.Name: MDP_INJECTOR_2_DAT_NVT[1] - 1600b
Data.Comment: Minimum drive pulse for injector 2 at 1600 bars

Data.Name: MDP_INJECTOR_3_DAT_NVT[0] - 200b
Data.Comment: Minimum drive pulse for injector 3 at 200 bars

Data.Name: MDP_INJECTOR_3_DAT_NVT[1] - 1600b
Data.Comment: Minimum drive pulse for injector 3 at 1600 bars

Data.Name: MDP_INJECTOR_4_DAT_NVT[0] - 200b
Data.Comment: Minimum drive pulse for injector 4 at 200 bars

Data.Name: MDP_INJECTOR_4_DAT_NVT[1] - 1600b
Data.Comment: Minimum drive pulse for injector 4 at 1600 bars

Data.Name: MDP_NUMBER_OF_UPDATE_INJ_NVT[0]
Data.Comment: Number of times injector 1 has been updated

Data.Name: MDP_NUMBER_OF_UPDATE_INJ_NVT[1]
Data.Comment: Number of times injector 2 has been updated

Data.Name: MDP_NUMBER_OF_UPDATE_INJ_NVT[2]
Data.Comment: Number of times injector 3 has been updated

Data.Name: MDP_NUMBER_OF_UPDATE_INJ_NVT[3]
Data.Comment: Number of times injector 4 has been updated

Data.Name: MemoryAddress-answer
Data.Comment: Adresse de la zone memoire equivalente a celle figurant dans la requete

Data.Name: MemorySize
Data.Comment: the number of bytes to be read according to the address specified on the request.

Data.Name: MIL_Drive
Data.Comment: Indicates the state of the MI lamp drive

Data.Name: MIL_Indicator_drive_mode
Data.Comment: Indicates the state of the mil indicator drive

Data.Name: Mute module
Data.Comment: diagnostic of "mute module"

Data.Name: Mux messaging reference
Data.Comment: Messaging version N° identification

Data.Name: Nb of Driving Cycles since fault has disappeared
Data.Comment: nombre de cycle avec le défaut mémorisé

Data.Name: Nb of Driving Cycles with fault present
Data.Comment: nombre de cycle avec défaut présent

Data.Name: No_auto_GB_request_torque
Data.Comment: Torque value derived from the main fuel before ASR fuel arbitration

Data.Name: OBD class dc status carrier
Data.Comment: Carrier of test status for all classes

Data.Name: OBD state carrier
Data.Comment: donne les différents états du gestionnaire OBD

Data.Name: OBD_Catalyst_class_dc_status
Data.Comment: Status of Catalyst class for the current driving cycle

Data.Name: OBD_Egr_class_dc_status
Data.Comment: Status of EGR class for the current driving cycle

Data.Name: OBD_enabled
Data.Comment: Indicates OBD enabled

Data.Name: OBD_Freeze_frame.Data[0] : OBD_Load
Data.Comment: OBD load

Data.Name: OBD_Freeze_frame.Data[1] : OBD_Coolant_temperature
Data.Comment: Coolant temperature

Data.Name: OBD_Freeze_frame.Data[2/3] : OBD_Engine_speed
Data.Comment: Engine speed

Data.Name: OBD_Freeze_frame.Data[4] : OBD_Vehicle_speed
Data.Comment: Vehicle _speed

Data.Name: OBD_Freeze_frame.Data[6] : OBD_Boost_pressure
Data.Comment: Boost pressure

Data.Name: OBD_Fuel_sys_class_dc_status
Data.Comment: Status of Fuel_sys class for the current driving cycle

Data.Name: OBD_Misfire_class_dc_status
Data.Comment: Status of Misfire class for the current driving cycle

Data.Name: OBD_Other_comps_class_dc_status
Data.Comment: Status of Other_comps class for the current driving cycle

Data.Name: OBD_RFFD_PID_00_APT
Data.Comment: Supported PID for OBD service $02

Data.Name: OBD_Test_all_class_status
Data.Comment: Status of all classes

Data.Name: Open_brake_sw_connected_NVV
Data.Comment: indicates whether Open brake switch connected

Data.Name: Other system specifics
Data.Comment: utilisé pour le VMAP et la date synthèse calib en Hexa

Data.Name: Pedal_position
Data.Comment: Demanded pedal value

Data.Name: Pedal_position [%]
Data.Comment: Pedal position for freeze frame

Data.Name: PETROL_VEHICLE_APV
Data.Comment: This application data shall be set to 0, indicating a diesel vehicle

Data.Name: Piece No
Data.Comment: Reference du boitier programme (hard + soft + calib)

Data.Name: PPH_Control_state [-]
Data.Comment: Shows the current PPH state enabled

Data.Name: PPH_Relay_drive_mode = PPH_RELAY_ON
Data.Comment: PPH relay is currently driven

Data.Name: Rail_pressure_demand
Data.Comment: The demanded rail pressure

Data.Name: Rail_pressure_demand [bar]
Data.Comment: rail pressure dempand for freeze frame

Data.Name: Rail_pressure_feedback
Data.Comment: Scaled, linearised and validated sensor reading

Data.Name: Rail_pressure_feedback [bar]
Data.Comment: Rail pressure feedback for freeze fame

Data.Name: Rail_pressure_linearised [bar]
Data.Comment: Rail pressure linearised for freeze fame

Data.Name: Rail_pressure_raw [-]
Data.Comment: Raw rail pressure for freeze frame

Data.Name: Railp_cal_count_NVV
Data.Comment: Count used in setting of Rail pressure calibration fault of type medium. Saved to NVM at power-down.

Data.Name: Railp_cal_NVV
Data.Comment: Copy of Rail_pressure_feedback made during Detection of Rail Pressure Calibration Faults

Data.Name: Raw_ADC_Data[AMF_INDEX_CPV]
Data.Comment: AMF voltage

Data.Name: Raw_ADC_Data[BATTERY_INDEX_CPV] [-]
Data.Comment: Raw battery voltage for freeze frame

Data.Name: Raw_ADC_Data[EGR_FEEDBACK_INDEX_CPV]
Data.Comment: EGR potentiometer voltage

Data.Name: Raw_ADC_Data[ENG_BOOSTP_INDEX_CPV]
Data.Comment: Boost pressure voltage

Data.Name: Raw_ADC_Data[PEDAL_2_MON_INDEX_CPV] [-]
Data.Comment: Raw sensor voltage for freeze frame

Data.Name: Raw_ADC_Data[PEDAL1_INDEX_CPV]
Data.Comment: Pedal 1 voltage

Data.Name: Raw_ADC_Data[PEDAL1_INDEX_CPV] [-]
Data.Comment: Pedal 1 for freeze frame

Data.Name: Raw_ADC_Data[PEDAL2_INDEX_CPV]
Data.Comment: Pedal 2 voltage

Data.Name: Raw_ADC_Data[PEDAL2_INDEX_CPV] [-]
Data.Comment: Pedal 2 for freeze frame

Data.Name: Raw_ADC_Data[RAILP_INDEX_CPV]
Data.Comment: Rail pressure voltage

Data.Name: im_status
Data.Comment: IMV control state

Data.Name: REDUCED_FUEL_x_FAULT_GROUP
Data.Comment: Any of REDUCED_FUEL_x_FAULT_GROUP is active

Data.Name: Requested DTC
Data.Comment: diagnostic trouble code

Item.Text: Mass or Volume Air Flow "A" Circuit
Mass or Volume Air Flow "A" Circuit Range/Performance
Exhaust Gas Recirculation Throttle Position Control Circuit
Internal Control Module Random Access Memory (RAM) Error
Engine Hot Lamp Output Control Circuit
Engine Coolant Heater "A" Relay Control Circuit
Engine Coolant Heater "B" Relay Control Circuit
Engine Coolant Heater "C" Relay Control Circuit
Exhaust Gas Recirculation Cooler Bypass Control Circuit/Open
Invalid Data Received From Instrument Panel Control Module

Data.Name: ResetMode
Data.Comment: This parameter is used by the ECUReset service to describe how the ECU must perform the reset

Data.Name: Scaled_CAN_Fuel_consumption
Data.Comment: Scaled value of cumulative fuel consumption. Passed to the interaction presentation layer and output

Data.Name: Scaled_expected_torque
Data.Comment: Expected torque derived from the driver fuel demand

Data.Name: Scaled_idle_reference
Data.Comment: Scaled value of Idle_reference

Data.Name: Scaled_mean_effective_torque
Data.Comment: The mean effective torque derived from the mapped fuel demand

Data.Name: Scaled_mean_effective_torque_
Data.Comment: The mean effective torque derived from the mapped fuel demand

Data.Name: Scaled_total_friction_torque
Data.Comment: Global torque lost with friction and accessories consumption

Data.Name: Soft_engine_stop_request
Data.Comment: Identifies whether or not a fault that is a member of the soft engine stop fault group is active

Data.Name: Software No
Data.Comment: Application logiciel en Hexa

Item.Text: IM current trim low fuel high
IM current trim high fuel high
IM current trim low fuel low

Data.Name: Speed_limiter_present_NVV
Data.Comment: Speed limiter option present

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Data.Name: Status
Data.Comment: Status of DTC

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault (Memorized)
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground (Memorized)
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery (Memorized)
No possible classification about the type of fault (Current)
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground (Current)
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery (Current)
IM current trim low fuel high (Memorized)
IM current trim high fuel high (Memorized)
IM current trim low fuel low (Memorized)
IM current trim low fuel high (Current)
IM current trim high fuel high (Current)
IM current trim low fuel low (Current)

Data.Name: Stored_crash_detected_NVV
Data.Comment: Diag byte stored upon reception of a coherent AIRBAG_Crash frame

Data.Name: Supplier No
Data.Comment: Numero ITG du fournisseur en ASCII

Data.Name: recovery_mode_active
Data.Comment: One of the RECOVERY faults is active

Data.Name: TACHO_OUTPUT
Data.Comment: Tacho output is active

Data.Name: Thp1_relay_fitted
Data.Comment: Flag indicating Thp 1 is fitted

Data.Name: Thp2_relay_fitted
Data.Comment: Flag indicating Thp 2 is fitted

Data.Name: Thp3_relay_fitted
Data.Comment: Flag indicating Thp 3 is fitted

Data.Name: Throttle_control_state [-]
Data.Comment: Throttle control state for freeze frame

Data.Name: Throttle_drive_control_mode [-]
Data.Comment: The input variable to the throttle driver for freeze frame

Data.Name: Torque_req_stat
Data.Comment: Indicate the torque request status

Item.Text: 1 - Exact torque could not be obtained

Data.Name: Vehicle_distance_NVV
Data.Comment: Total vehicle distance travelled

Data.Name: Vehicle_speed
Data.Comment: Vehicle speed processed from the vehicle speed sensor input

Data.Name: Vehicle_speed [km/h]
Data.Comment: Vehicle Speed for freeze frame

Data.Name: Vehicle_speed_change_rate [m/s2]
Data.Comment: decreas vehicle speed for freeze frame

Data.Name: Vehicle_speed_sensor_NVV <> 0
Data.Comment: A vehicle speed information has been seen (CAN or Wire)

Data.Name: Version No
Data.Comment: Niveau de calibration en Hexa

Data.Name: Vext_linearised [V]
Data.Comment: sensor voltage linearised for freeze frame

Data.Name: VGT_Actuator_fitted
Data.Comment: Flag indicating VGT is fitted

Data.Name: VGT_Ctl_ofs_pwm_NVV
Data.Comment: VGT offset pwm value stored in NVM

Data.Name: VGT_So_final_pwm
Data.Comment: PWM output signal to component driver

Data.Name: VGT_So_state
Data.Comment: Regulation State

Data.Name: VGT_So_state [-]
Data.Comment: VGT Regulation State for freeze frame

Data.Name: VGT_Sp_pressure
Data.Comment: Set point pressure value

Data.Name: VGT_Sp_pressure [bar]
Data.Comment: Collector pressure demand for freeze frame

Data.Name: VINcrc
Data.Comment: Checksum

Data.Name: VINnb
Data.Comment: Vehicle Identification Number in ASCII

Data.Name: VLC_Fuel_offset_NVT[0]
Data.Comment: VLC fuel offset NVT

Data.Name: VLC_Fuel_offset_NVT[1]
Data.Comment: VLC fuel offset NVT

Data.Name: VLC_State
Data.Comment: Defines the state of the Variable Limit Capacity strategy

Data.Name: Water_in_fuel_connected_NVV
Data.Comment: Signals the presence of the fuel in water sensor

Data.Name: InjectorCode.hexa.1
Data.Comment: Individual injector correction for cylinder 1

Data.Name: InjectorCode.hexa.2
Data.Comment: Individual injector correction for cylinder 2

Data.Name: InjectorCode.hexa.3
Data.Comment: Individual injector correction for cylinder 3

Data.Name: InjectorCode.hexa.4
Data.Comment: Individual injector correction for cylinder 4

Data.Name: InjectorCode.hexa.All
Data.Comment: Individual injector correction for cylinders 1 to 4

Data.Name: InjectorCode.Status.Write
Data.Comment: Writing status of C2I in NVM

Data.Name: Pedal2_mon [-]
Data.Comment: This is the validated sample of the voltage on the pedal 2 mon input

Data.Name: CC_HW_Cruise_lim_driver_sw_raw [-]
Data.Comment: Rv Lv Sensor voltage for freeze frame

Data.Name: sure_eng_stop
Data.Comment: Engine stop requested by the anti run dry strategy

Request.Name: Start Diagnostic Session
Request.Comment: This service request is used to start a new diagnostic session. Certain functions or modes of operation may only be available after a particular diagnostic session has been activated.

Request.Name: ECUReset
Request.Comment: This service allows to replace NVM values with the default values stored in Flash Memory. The list of the NVM values which will be replaced depends on the resetMode.

Request.Name: FF_DTC_C001
Request.Comment: Freeze frame description for DTC C001

DataItem.Name: Nb of Driving Cycles with fault present
Nb of Driving Cycles since fault has disappeared

Request.Name: StartRoutine Test OBD End Of Line
StartCom
Request.Comment: This communication service allows the diagnostic data exchange initialisation. It can only be used with "Fast Initialisation".

Request.Name: StopCom
Request.Comment: This service is used to terminate a communication session. Communication may only restart after a successful initialisation request.

Device.Name: Mass or Volume Air Flow "A" Circuit
Internal Control Module Random Access Memory (RAM) Error
Engine Hot Lamp Output Control Circuit
Engine Coolant Heater "A" Relay Control Circuit
Engine Coolant Heater "B" Relay Control Circuit
Engine Coolant Heater "C" Relay Control Circuit

Label.Text: Use the DDT2000 Generic Tools for the following operations
Caution : Injector codes must be saved in XML format !

Screen.Name: Frame 40 to 42 : read complete frames ($C7 to $C9)
Frame 40 to 42 : write complete frames ($DB to $DD)

Label.Text: Corrections : Timing advance, Idle reference, Excess fuel
